  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

HFCK (Kit Main Libre Evolué)

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 750
Recv ID: 770
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0F
Func Name: HFCK

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "213",
    "soft": "0900",
    "version": "0000"
  },

    "version": "0000"
  },
  {

    "soft": "1100",
    "version": "0000"
  }
